alkylation reagent: 100 mM NH4HCO3 containing 1% (w/v) iodoacetamide as the alkylation reagent
alkylation concentration: 100 mM NH4HCO3 containing 1% (w/v) iodoacetamide as the alkylation reagent
cleavage agent: trypsin as the enzyme and allowing up to two missed cleavages
fragmentation method: analyzed using Q-Exactive Plus MS (Thermo Fisher Scientific)
instrument: connected to QExactive Orbitrap: Thermo Fisher Scientific
reduction concentration: 100 mM NH4HCO3 containing 0.15% (w/v) dithiothreitol as the reducing agent
